subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen proclaimeth: That which thou didst set forth in thy letter was observed. Yet strange it is that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید آنچه در کتابت معروض داشتی مشاهده شد ولکن عجب است از اینکه
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
